name: Story Spark
summary: Design story structure with first-class topology and produce Passage Briefs
purpose: Create or update story identity (IFID), design narrative topology (passages, links, hubs, loops, gateways), and produce Passage Briefs for Scene Weave. Topology first, briefs second, prose never.
description: Produces story, topology, and passage_brief artifacts from story requirements. Plotwright designs topology (passages with roles, links with optional gates) and writes briefs specifying goal, stakes, and choice intents for each passage. Gatekeeper validates topology integrity (reachability, single start, valid links). Does NOT produce prose - outputs ready passage_briefs for scene_weave. Raises hooks for canon gaps requiring lore_deepening.

triggers.condition: New chapter, act, subplot, or restructure request
Fixes needed for reachability or topology issues
Hook-led expansion suggesting new passages or links

context_requirements: Current Cold snapshot (canon, codex, style guardrails)

required_artifacts.description: Story manifest with IFID, name, and project metadata
Graph structure with passages and links
Passage Briefs for each topology passage (promoted to ready after preview gate)

optional_artifacts.description: Narrative and scene hooks generated during topology design

story_setup.name: Story Setup
story_setup.purpose: Create or update the story manifest with IFID and core metadata

create_or_update_story.action: Create a new story artifact with UUID v4 IFID, or load existing story for updates. Set name, logline, theme, genre, tone, and target format.
create_or_update_story.guidance: If this is a new story, generate a fresh IFID (UUID v4). For existing stories, preserve the IFID and increment current_pass. The IFID is the story's permanent identity across all artifacts.

completion_criteria: Story artifact exists with valid IFID
Story has name, logline, and active_phase set to 'structure'

topology_design.name: Topology Design
topology_design.purpose: Create the graph structure: passages (nodes) with roles and links (edges) with optional gates

design_passages.action: Define passages with pid, name, tags, and topology_role (hub, loop, gateway, linear). Mark exactly one passage as is_start and identify ending passages.
design_passages.guidance: Think in terms of player navigation: where do choices fan out (hub), where do players return changed (loop), where is progress gated (gateway). Passages are graph nodes - structure only, no prose yet.

outputs.name: passages_draft
outputs.description: List of passages with pids and roles

design_links.action: Define links between passages. For gated links, write diegetic gate conditions the Player-Narrator can enforce.
design_links.guidance: Links are directed edges from one passage to another. Gate conditions must be in-world terms ('foreman's token', 'maintenance hex-key'), never schema names or flag IDs.

outputs.name: links_draft
outputs.description: List of links with from/to pids and optional gates

create_topology.action: Assemble passages and links into the topology artifact, referencing the story's IFID.
create_topology.guidance: The topology artifact is the authoritative graph structure. All passage_briefs and passages will reference this topology via topology_passage_ref.

feasibility_check.action: Review topology for canon collisions and flag where Lore Deepening will be needed.
feasibility_check.guidance: Identify any canon constraints that affect the proposed structure. Do not block - note concerns and suggest where deepening is needed.

completion_criteria: Topology artifact exists with ifid matching story
Exactly one passage marked is_start
All passages have pid, name, and topology_role
All links reference valid passage pids
Canon feasibility concerns are documented

topology_validation.name: Topology Validation
topology_validation.purpose: Validate graph structure before creating briefs

validate_structure.action: Validate topology: single start, all passages reachable from start, all link targets exist, at least one ending.
validate_structure.guidance: This is structural validation only. Check graph properties without considering prose or narrative quality.

outputs.name: validation_result
outputs.description: Pass/fail with any structural issues found

completion_criteria: Exactly one start passage
All passages reachable from start
All link targets reference existing passages
At least one ending passage exists

on_failure.message: Topology validation failed. Return to Topology Design to fix structural issues.

brief_creation.name: Brief Creation
brief_creation.purpose: Create Passage Briefs that Scene Smith can draft from without ambiguity

write_briefs.action: For each topology passage, create a Passage Brief with goal, key beats, choice intents, and constraints. Reference topology_passage_ref to the passage pid.
write_briefs.guidance: A good brief answers: What is the player trying to achieve? What are the stakes? What choices should feel meaningfully different? What outcomes connect to the larger topology? Leave voice/register decisions to Style Lead.

outputs.name: passage_briefs
outputs.description: Passage Briefs ready for Scene Weave

generate_hooks.action: Create hook cards for any ideas that arose during topology design. This step is MANDATORY - at least one hook or explicit justification required.
generate_hooks.guidance: Review your work and create hooks for ANY of these triggers: (1) canon_gap: Lore referenced but not established, (2) scene_idea: Opportunity for future content, (3) fact_check: Real-world verification needed, (4) style_note: Voice or register uncertainty. If no triggers occurred, you MUST state explicitly: 'No hook triggers occurred because [reason]'

completion_criteria: Every topology passage has a Passage Brief
Briefs specify goal, stakes, choice intents, and constraints
Briefs reference topology_passage_ref matching topology pids
At least one hook_card created OR explicit justification that no triggers occurred
All hooks tagged with classification, uncertainty, and suggested_owner

preview_gate.name: Preview Gate
preview_gate.purpose: Quick sanity check on Integrity, Reachability, and Nonlinearity before handoff

pre_gate_check.action: Run pre-gate review using analyze_story_graph: check for structural integrity, reachability, and nonlinearity. Block on structural failures.
pre_gate_check.guidance: Use analyze_story_graph to check graph structure. BLOCKING issues (unreachable passages, missing link targets, no start passage) MUST be fixed here - scene_weave CANNOT fix structural problems. Only proceed to scene_weave if analyze_story_graph returns no blocking issues.

outputs.name: pre_gate_note
outputs.description: Early findings and risks for Showrunner

completion_criteria: analyze_story_graph returns no blocking issues
All passages reachable from start
All link targets exist in topology
Pre-gate note documents any warnings (non-blocking)

on_success.message: Topology validated. Passage Briefs ready for Scene Weave. Hooks ready for Hook Harvest.

primary.description: Write prose from the completed passage briefs

parallel.description: Triage hooks generated during topology design

conditional.condition: Canon gaps identified in feasibility check
conditional.description: Build missing canon before prose writing

on_failure.message: Structural issues found - must be fixed before scene_weave. Return to Topology Design to fix blocking issues. scene_weave CANNOT fix topology problems.
